Global (All).title: Rise in global COVID-19 cases
Global (All).summary: Increase in reported cases of COVID-19 globally, fueling concerns about potential new waves.

Global (All).title: Middle East tensions continue
Global (All).summary: Escalating tensions between Israel and regional adversaries heighten concerns about regional conflict.

Global (All).title: US-China tensions escalate
Global (All).summary: Increased rhetoric and military posturing between the US and China heighten concerns about conflict in the Taiwan Strait.

United States.title: Biden Orders Additional Air Defence Measures Over Ukraine: US President Joe Biden announced that additional air defence measures are being taken to assist Ukraine in countering the recent Russian missile strikes.
United States.summary: Increased tensions between the US and Russia over Ukraine.

United States.title: Texas Abortion Ban: US Supreme Court allows Texas' near-ban on abortions to continue, despite challenges in lower courts
United States.summary: Ongoing debate on reproductive rights in the US continues to escalate.

United States.title: Heat Wave Brings Extreme Temperatures to Western US: A prolonged heat wave is affecting the western United States, with temperatures reaching record highs.
United States.summary: Impacts of climate change continue to be felt across the US.

South Korea.title: North Korea Condemns US-South Korea Joint Military Drill
South Korea.summary: North Korea expressed anger towards the recent joint military drills between the US and South Korea, escalating tensions on the Korean Peninsula.

South Korea.title: South Korea to Increase Military Spending to Counter North Korea Threat
South Korea.summary: South Korea announced plans to increase its military spending to counter the growing threat from North Korea, highlighting the ongoing security concerns on the peninsula.

South Korea.title: Protests Erupt in South Korea Against Military Draft Reforms
South Korea.summary: Protests broke out in South Korea against reforms to the country's military draft system, sparking concerns about the government's handling of the issue.

Japan.title: Japan's F-35 fighter jets grounded over engine oil leak
Japan.summary: At least eight Japanese F-35 fighter jets have been grounded due to a problem with engine oil leakage.

Japan.title: Japan's economy shrinks for first time in three years as recession fear grows
Japan.summary: Japan's economy contracted in the first quarter of 2024, its first quarterly decline since 2021.

Japan.title: Fukushima's radioactive 'black rain' may have killed dozens: Japan government
Japan.summary: Japan's government has said that dozens of people may have died after being exposed to radioactive 'black rain' in the aftermath of the Fukushima nuclear disaster.
